steps: Log in with your Xero account or create one at https://www.xero.com/signup/
Click 'New app' in the top right
Enter an app name and select 'Web app' as the integration type
Enter your company URL and a redirect URI (e.g. https://yourapp.com/callback)
Click 'Generate a secret' on the app detail page
Copy your Client ID and Client Secret and store them securely

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: The OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Xero app

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: The OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from your Xero app

notes: Free developer account available with access to demo company data
Client secret is shown only once — copy it immediately after generating
Apps start in 'uncertified' mode; certification required for production use with real Xero organizations
Requires scopes to be configured in your OAuth flow (e.g. accounting.transactions, accounting.contacts)
Rate limit: 60 requests per minute per app

test_endpoint.description: List connected Xero organizations (requires valid access token from completed OAuth flow)
